title: Pterotropis beugesiaca
taxonomy: Pterotropis beugesiaca is a species of plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is native to South America and is known for its unique characteristics. The classification of Pterotropis beugesiaca is as follows: the genus Pterotropis is placed in the tribe Caryophylleae, within the subfamily Caryophylloideae, which is part of the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant is also classified as a member of the order Caryophyllales. The specific classification of Pterotropis beugesiaca provides valuable information about its evolutionary history and relationships with other plants.
uses: Pterotropis beugesiaca is a plant species with limited information available on its medicinal uses.
